title: Multiple-choice cloze
description: Read the text below and decide which answer (A, B, C or D) best fits each gap.

content.text: Ecologists studying forest regeneration have discovered that biodiversity plays a crucial role in ecosystem recovery. Early models (0) assumed that damaged forests would naturally rebound, but recent evidence challenges this optimism.||Many species rely on complex interactions that can easily (1) when habitats are disturbed. Without these relationships, forests may (2) to regenerate effectively.||One promising strategy is to (3) native species that support pollination and soil health. These organisms can (4) ecological processes and accelerate recovery.||However, restoration projects often (5) logistical obstacles, including limited funding and harsh weather conditions. Conservationists must therefore (6) their plans and remain adaptable.||Ultimately, the aim is to (7) ecosystems that can (8) future environmental pressures.

example.explanation: “Assumed” is the correct verb for early scientific models.

questions.explanation: “Struggle to regenerate” is the natural collocation.
